input.instructions: Conduct a deep dive into theoretical physics literature (specifically focusing on quantum optics and black hole thermodynamics) to identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. Focus on parameters related to photon statistics (e.g., g^(2) correlation functions), Wigner function negativity, or the transition from quantum to classical regimes. For each constant, provide its name, symbol, and exact numerical value.

orchestration.decision_notes: The user is asking for a highly specialized synthesis of theoretical physics literature. I need to search for specific parameters governing the classicality of Hawking radiation, specifically looking for dimensionless constants related to photon statistics and Wigner functions in the context of the quantum-to-classical transition.

Question:
Conduct a deep dive into theoretical physics literature (specifically focusing on quantum optics and black hole thermodynamics) to identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. Focus on parameters related to photon statistics (e.g., g^(2) correlation functions), Wigner function negativity, or the transition from quantum to classical regimes. For each constant, provide its name, symbol, and exact numerical value.

results.content: I will search for literature regarding the quantum-to-classical transition of Hawking radiation, focusing on photon statistics (g^(2) functions), Wigner function negativity, and the specific dimensionless constants that define the regime of single-photon Hawking radiation.
